slots.name: stats
slots.notes: Array of stats: { value, suffix?, label }. E.g., { value: '10K', suffix: '+', label: 'Active Users' }. Minimum 3, maximum 5.

slots.name: description
slots.notes: Optional secondary description below the stats

layout_variants.name: Single Row of Stats
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Minimalist horizontal layout placed over a dark Slate background. Metrics are separated by ultra-thin vertical divider lines (border-l border-white/5). Displays giant, bold [Heading Font] numbers in white, with labels in smaller [UI Font] light grey to establish sharp contrast. Entrance Animation: The entire row initializes hidden (opacity: 0, scaleY: 0.8). On scroll: Step 1: Vertical dividers draw from center outwards. Step 2: Metric groups slide up (y: 15px -> 0px) and trigger incremental number count animations from 0. On scroll up: Collapses and fades out. Hover Interaction: The column rises by 4px and numerals shift to Emerald color.

layout_variants.name: Stat Cards
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Individual metric cards arranged horizontally. Cards use solid glassmorphism (backdrop-blur bg-slate-900/60) with thin reflective borders (border border-white/10). Main numbers display in giant [Heading Font] emerald color for immediate visual weight, with labels in [UI Font]. Entrance Animation: Step 1: Cards initialize hidden (scale: 0.95, opacity: 0). Step 2: Cards slide up staggered with a 100ms delay. Step 3: Numbers count up dynamically from 0. On scroll up: Cards gather toward center and fade. Hover Interaction: Card lifts by 6px with a border glow, and numbers expand.

layout_variants.name: Infinite Marquee Stats Strip
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Infinite horizontal scrolling marquee strip showing stats. Groups are separated by rotating SVG icons. Numbers are highlighted in giant [Heading Font] neon colors, with descriptions in [UI Font]. Entrance Animation: Marquee slides smoothly. On scroll: Scroll velocity accelerates marquee speed. Hover Interaction: Speed drops by 80%, hovered stat shifts to brand Primary color and resets the number count animation from 0 for tactile feedback.

container.intent: Container entrance effect: Step 1: Initialize fully hidden (opacity: 0). Step 2: On scroll, fade in (opacity: 0 -> 1) over 600ms with a slight translate. On scroll up: Reverses animation to hide container.

number_counter.intent: Dynamic number counter using [Heading Font]: Step 1: Extract numeric values from string (e.g., '10K+' -> number 10, suffix 'K+'). Step 2: Once visible, count up from 0 to 10 over 2000ms using spring physics (easeOut). Step 3: Append the suffix smoothly. On scroll up: Resets number value to 0.

implementation._note: Reference — parse numbers from strings before animating. E.g., '10K+' -> count 0->10, append 'K+'

stat_card_hover.intent: Defines two hover interactions when hovering over stats cards to enhance visual feedback.

in.description: Stats bar usually uses a contrasting background (primary color, dark, or gradient) to draw attention
